pericopes.title: Chihna hoi jeh a kipamau kipe
Thaset jeh le Jousei jeh a Gihsalna
Chihna hol ding Ngolna dalhah ding
Hinkho chung chang le chonchan dol’a Thuchih kiseiho

chapters.text: Israel leng David chapa Solomon thuchih seidoh ho:
@@@1Mihemten chihna le hilchahna ahet @3theiya @2Thu kiseiho hi ipi kiseina ham, ti ahet @3thieina dia
@@@1Aphalam adihlama kihilchahna kisan’a, @2Adih le thudih chule akitoh a kisan @3ding ahi;
@@@1Chutileh milham jeng jong @2Lungthim chingtah a um’uva, @1Khangdong ho jeng jong hi @2Hetna le thil datkhenje them diu ahi.
@@@1Michingin jong kho ajah a thepna aholbe @3thei, @2Hetkhenna nei mihemin jong khut themna @3aholbe thei ahi.
@@@1Chutia chu thuchih kiseile @2Thil kigondol ahetdoh theiya @1Miching ho thuseiho leh @2Thulem aseijouseu ahetdoh ding ahi.
@@@1Pakai gin kiti hi hetna bulpi kipatna @3ahin, @2Mi ngol hon vang chihna le hilchahna @3asang pouve.
@@@1Kachapa, napan nahilna ngaiphan @3lang, @2Nanun nahilna jong paimang din gotdan;
@@@1Ajeh chu ama nin nahilna chengse chu @2Nalua delkop pah-leh banga naki-kop’a @1Na-ngong changa @2Khivui ki-oh banga naki-o ding ahi.
@@@1Kachapa, michonseten jol lhah dia @3nagot tengu leh @2Athu’uva nun ding go hih hel’in.
@@@1Amahon najah a aseiyuva, @2“Hungin kilhonu hitin mi thisan @3so din ngah-u hite; @1Themmona beihel miho jong chu @2Inop igot’a bol din chang lhiu @3hite;
@@@1Ahing laiyuva noimigamin aval @3lhuma abahgam bangin @2Eihon jong amaho khu bahgamu hite; @1Kokhuh sunga lhalutsa ho bangin @2Apum pum’uvin val lhum jengu hite.
@@@1Chutileh thil manlu tah tah jong @3ikilah jeng diu, @2Mi thilkeo kichomdoh ho chu insung @3dima ikikoi diu ahi.
@@@1Keiho lah-a vang hung kisanin lang, @2Sumdip khat kikop’in sum khol khomu @3hite,” atiu jongleh,
@@@1Kachapa, amaho khutoh lampi khat @3jot khom hih-in, @2Amaho lamlhah dunga konin nakengphang @3nung chonin;
@@@1Ajeh chu thilse lama akeng jang @3khaiyun, @2Hetman lou louvin thisan asojiuvin ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh vachan amupet’a @2Lenpel kisonpeh kiti chu pannabei @3ahibouve.
@@@1Hiche miho jong hin amaho thisan @3so nadia @2Midang achan lhih jiu ahin, @1Athilona ding bep’uva @2Mi ana lamtin’uva achan lhih jiu @3ahibouve.
@@@1Pumhat jenga phatchomna holte lam-lhah @3chu hitobang bang hi ahimong nan, @2Thil neipaa apan vangun athilo bep jiuve.
@@@1Chihna hin kholai dunga o-thongje @3jun lhang asamin, @2Kailhang dunga jong a-ogin kithong @3hel’in apenge;
@@@1Palvum dunga jong chihna chu @3apeng-jahjengin, @2Khopi kelkot phung dunga jong thu @3aseijie.
@@@1“Vo milham ho, itih chanpi milham mai @3maiya um ding nadeiyu hiya, @2Midai thanga pang hon jong itih chan @3geiya mi nadai thang diu ham? @1Mi ngolten itih chan hetna nahot diu @3hitam?
@@@1Keiman mi kaphona hi ngai phauvin, @2Vetan, keiman nahenguva kalung gel @3twisuna kasun lhah khum ding @4nahiuve; @@@1Chutengleh keima thusei jouse hi @2Nang ho kahetsah ding nahiuve.
@@@1Ajeh chu keiman kakouvun @2Nang hon neihou pouve; @1Kakhut’in kahin sanguvin @2Koimachan jong i-eisah poi.
@@@1Guhthima kahilna abonchan nahsah @3louvin nakoiyun, @2Kaphosalna jouse jong khatcha @3nasang pouve.
@@@1Hamsetna nato tengu leh kenjong @3kanuisat diu, @2Manthah nan naphah tenguleh totna @3kanei diu nahi.

@@@1Khopi huiyin asem banga @2Manthah nan nahin phah uva, @1Chimpei kipei banga @2Hamsetna nato diuvin naphah tengu @3jongleh @2Hesoh le gentheina nasa tah chun @3a alhun khumu jongleh @2Khohsahna kaneipeh lou ding nahiuve.
@@@1Hijongleh amahon eihin kouvuva, @2Keiman kahou deh louhel ding, @1Lung gil tah a eihol hol diu, @2Eimudoh jou deh lou diu ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh amahon hetna @3adei pouvin, @2Pakai ginje jong khohsah a kilhen @3din agel pouve.
@@@1Guhthima kahilna khatcha jong @3alapouvin, @2Kaphosalna jouse jong not thap in @3aneiyui.
@@@1Hijeh a chu amahon atohgau @3akineh diu, @2Thilse agon jouseu chu thaotwijol @3banga jolsoh diu ahi.
@@@1Ajeh chu amahon lampi ajot khel @3tenguleh @2Milhamho chu min athagamlo jin, @1Mi ngol ho kiletsahna chu @2Amaho sumanga pangji ahibouve.
@@@1Hijeh chun koi hijongleh @2Kasei ngai jouse chu lung monga @3cheng ding, @1Thilse ging louhel’a @2Mongtah a cheng jing ding ahi,” ati.
@@@1Kachapa, nangin kasei jouse nasan’a @2Kathupeh aboncha goukhol banga @3nakhol jinga,
@@@1Chihna thu lung lut’a na-ngai @3lhih jinga, @2Nalungthima thil hetkhen ding @3nakhohsah a ahileh;
@@@1Ahinai, thil kiselguh hetna dia @3lhang nasap jenga, @2Thil ketkhen theina dia o-thongje @3jua napen’a,
@@@1Dangka hol’a nahollea @2Gou kiselmang hol banga nahol @3thei leh
@@@1Pakai ginje nahetdoh ding, @2Pathen hetna namudoh ding ahitai.
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin chihna apen, @2Akamsunga konin hetna le hetkhenna @3potdoh-e.
@@@1Milungdih din chihna phatah tah @3akholjin, @2Lungthim kehlouva lamjotte din lum’in @3apange;
@@@1Thu adih a tan ding jeng agel’in, @2Ami thengte lampi asempeh jingin ahi.
@@@1Hichea hi nangin adih le thu adih @3a kitan nahetdoh a @2Kitoh tah a lampi phalai jouse @3nahet ding ahi;
@@@1Ajeh chu nalung sunga chihna hung @3lut ding, @2Nahinkho dia jong hetna hi lung lhaina @3hi ding ahi.
@@@1Thil hetkhen them nan nachin @3jinga @2Hettoh nan nahontup jing jeng @3ding ahi.
@@@1Thilse lampia kona nahuhdoh jinga, @2Akaleh akalouva thusei mi tea kona @3nahuhdoh ding ahi.
@@@1Hitobang miho lungdih a chena @3lampi haiya; @2Muthim lampia che nomhoa konin;
@@@1Thilse bol ding jeng athanom’uvin, @2Chule a-eng alouva thilse bol ding @3kipa nan alauve.
@@@1Amaho hi alamlhah jouseu akon @3chet chut’in, @2Alampi jouse jong damun lama bol @3jeng ahiuve.
@@@1Numei phalouva kona jong nahoidoh @3thei ding, @2Mat chahna dia thu ngei ngei aseiya @3kona jong nahoidoh ding ahi;
@@@1Hitobang numei hin asen-gol @3adalhah a @2A-Pathen henga akitepna jong asuh-mil @3ahitai.
@@@1Hijeh chun amanu hi ainsung @3jeng jong thina lha lut ding ahitan, @2Alampi jouse jong damun lama akilhung @3lut’e.
@@@1Hiche numeinu koma vahlut @3jouse chu @2Koimacha hung kinungle kit louding, @1Amaho hin hinna lampi jouse chu @2Ahin jotkhah kit louhel diu @3ahitai.
@@@1Hijeh a chu nangma mipha ho lampia @3nache jinga, @2Midih ho lamlhah jouse najui jing @3ding ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh milungdih hon @3gam-sung alouva, @2Lungthim keh louhel ho chu gam-sunga @3cheng den diu ahi.
@@@1Migilou vang chu aboncha gamsunga @3kona @2Kisubei soh hel ding ahiuvin, @1Joule nal’a kilep ho chu @2Gamsunga kona abul abal’a kikaldoh @3ding ahiuve.
@@@1Kachapa, kahilna hi sumil hih @3hel’in, @2Kathupeh chengse hi nalungthim-in @3ching jingin;
@@@1Ajeh chu hiche kabilna ho hin @2Nahin nikho atamsah thei, nahin @3kumkho asotsah thei, @1Phattheina thalhingset’a @2Napeh thei ding ahiye.
@@@1Tahsan naumna le nakitahna chu lhaso @3hih hel’in, @2Hiche teni chu khivui-on ki-on lang, @1Abonchan nalung thima nalung changa @3chun @2Lekhajem kijih lut bangin jih lut’in.
@@@1Chutileh Pathen le mihem mu dinga @2Lung lhai nauma minpha namu @3ding ahi.
@@@1Nalungthim pumpin Pakai jeng @3tahsa-nin, @2Nangma chihna mai maiyin kisong @3hih-in.
@@@1Nache na lam lama Pakai jeng @3phong-doh-in, @2Chutileh aman nalampi jouse @3nasem-jangpeh ding ahi.
@@@1Nangma mitmun kichang chihsah @3dan, @2Pakai jeng gingin thilsea konin @3kihei mangjon.
@@@1Chutileh natahsa dia damtheina @3hintin, @2Nagu nachang jouse dia jong kido-dohna @3hiding ahi.
@@@1Nalousoh ga masa jouse leh @3nanei jouse @2Pakai jabol nan tohdoh jengin;
@@@1Chutengle nachang pang aboncha @3dim-soh a, @2Lengpithei twi nachilna mun jouse @3jong letsoh ding ahi.
@@@1Kachapa, Pakaiyin nagahna chu @3don-louvin koidan, @2Aman naphona jouse jong theichim-in @3nei hih hel’in;
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh mipan akipapi @3achapa abolna banga @2Pakaiyin jong mi angailut chubou @3aphosal ji ahi.
@@@1Chihna le thil hetkhenna kimudoh @3mihem chu @2Anun nom ahitai;
@@@1Ajeh chu hichea phatchomna chu @2Dangkaa kona phatchomna sanga @3phachomjo ahin, @2Hichea kona akandoh kimu jong @1Sana sanga phachomjo nalai ahi.
@@@1Chihna hi sana pahcha jem sanga @3manlujo ahin, @2Hijeh chun nadeichat ito bang @3hijongle natethei lou ding @4ahibouve.
@@@1Hinkho sotna ding jong @2Chihna hin akhut jetlama akichoi @3ahin, @1Haona le kijabolna jong @2Akhut veilama akichoi jinge.
@@@1Chihna lampi chu lung lhaina @3jeng ahin. @2Alamlhah jouse jong chamna ahisoh @3hel’e.
@@@1Akituh khah chengse din @2Chihna hi hinna thingphung ahin, @1Chihna kikol chah jing ho chu @2Mi nun nom akiti tauve.
@@@1Pakaiyin chihna amana leiset @3aphudoh ahin, @2Thil ahetkhen theina jal’a vanmun @3jouse asemdoh ahi.
@@@1Pakai thil hettoh jeh a komtong @3jouse kisemdoh ahin, @2Meilhang jousen jong gotwi ahinphi @3lhah jiu ahi.
@@@1Kachapa, chihna phatah chingin @2Thil datkhenje them jingin, @1Namitmun hichengse jong hi @2Kitolmang sah hih hel’in.
@@@1Chihna le thil datkhen themna chu @2Nalhagao din jong hinjouna hintin. @1Natahsa ngong chang dung jenga @3jong @2Khivuiya kijepna banga nakijepna @3thei hiding ahi.
@@@1Chutileh lung mong tah a nalampia @3nachele ding, @2Nakengto jeng jong nachotnal thei @3lou ding ahi.
@@@1Touthim jongle chun nakichat @3lou ding, @2Lum jongle chun na-ihmut nom lheh @3ding ahi.
@@@1Photlot louva thi ding kicha @3hih hel’in. @2Migilouten mi asuhgam jeng diu jong @3ging hih-in.
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakaibou nakisonna @3hiding, @2Aman nakeng phang jong thangkol’a @3a-oh sah lou ding ahi.
@@@1Nathan ajo laisen nabolpeh @3thei chan din @2Thilpha bolpeh ding thase loujen in.
@@@1Na-inheng nagalveng jah a jong @2“Chen lang hung kit tan, @1Jing tengleh nape nange,” tin @2Naneisa san seipeh hih hel’in.
@@@1Na-inheng nagalveng ding @2Thilse ngaito dan; @1Ama chu nangma koma @2Nakisonpi tah a cheng ahibouve.
@@@1Ajeh beiyin mitoh kina hih-in, @2Aman imacha naloa nabolset lou @3pet chun.
@@@1Pumhat mang mihem chu thangset @3pi dan, @2Ache na lampi dungjong jui hih @3hel’in.
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakai dinga mi lamvai @3chu @2Thet umtah ahin, @1Milungdih vang chu @2Pakai jenga kisong ahinai.
@@@1Pakai gaosapna chu migilou inchunga @3achun, @2Midih chenna vang chu Pakaiyin @3phatthei aboh-e.
@@@1Mi noisete din Pakai chu mi noise @3tah ahin, @2Mi lung nengte vang a lung lhaipi @3lheh jie.
@@@1Michingin mihem jabolna akimua @2Mi ngol-ho vang vetda chang diu @3ahi.
@@@1Vo chapate, mipan nahilchah nau @3ngai phauvin, @2Asung thu nahetdoh-uva phatchomna @3naneina diuvin lung lut’in @4ngaiyun.
@@@1Ajeh chu keiman nang ho hi danpha @3kapeh nahiuvin, @2Hijeh chun kahilna sukeh hih-un.
@@@1Keima kapa dia chapa changkhat @3kahiya @2Kanu mitmua jong deile ngai kaum @3laiyin,
@@@1Kapan eihil’in kajah a hitin aseiye, @2“Kasei jouse hi nalungthimin @3kolchah jingin, @1Kathupeh chengse hi nit jingin @2Hin nan nei jengin;
@@@1Sumil loujenin, kakamsung soh @2kathuseihoa kon hin @1Kihei mang loujenin, chihna hol’in @2asung thu hen.
@@@1Chihna chu dalha hih-in, @2Chihna chun nangma nachin ding ahi; @1Chihna chu ngailun, @2Chihna chun nangma na-ngah nante.
@@@1Chihna bulpi akipatna chu hiche @3hi ahi; @2Chihna holdoh-in, @1Itobang chihna hijongleh, @2Naholdoh chan chu asung thu @3hethemin.
@@@1Chihna chu sang tah-in domsangin, @2Chutileh chih nan nangma nadop @3sang ding ahi. @1Chihna chu nakolchah jinga ahileh, @2Nangma hi chihnan ja tah a nabol @3ding ahi.
@@@1Chihna chun nalujanga delkop @3hoitah nakop peh’a, @2Lal lukhuh hoitah nakhuhpeh ding @3ahi,” ati.
@@@1Kachapa kasei ngaiyin lang, @2Kathupeh chengse kisanin; @1Chutileh nahinkho jong @2Kum tampi nahin ding ahi.
@@@1Keiman chihna lampi jong @3kahil tan, @2Adih a chonna lampi jousea jong @3kapuisoh tai.
@@@1Nava le tengjongleh nakalsotna @3nakipal lou ding, @2Lhai jongle chun nakise lhuh @3lou ding ahi.
@@@1Nakihil chahna chu lhaso louvin @3tuh chah jingin, @2Kihilna chu chingphan, hichu @3nahin na ahibouve.
@@@1Migiloute lampia valut dan @3lang, @2Mi engsete lamlena jong vahle @3hih-in.
@@@1Hiche lampi chu peldoh-in, asunga @3vahlut hih-in; @2Hiche lampia chun kihei mangin @3jotpai jengin.
@@@1Ajeh chu thil dihlou abol masah @3louvu leh, @2Amaho chu ihmu thei loudiu ahin, @1Midang khatbeh akipal lhuh sah lou @3uva ahileh, @2Amaho ihmu thei lou diu ahitai.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh amahon gitlouna @3ga akineh-u ahin, @2Pumhat’a thil aboljiu chu ju-dona @3adonu ahitai.
@@@1Midih ho lamlhah vang chu, @2Jingkah khovah hung vah abangin, @1Sunkim geiya nisa asat ham geiya @3asat bangin, @1Avah cheh avah cheh jengin @3achansel jenge.
@@@1Migiloute lamlhah vang muthim @3lhangkhal kiheh abangin, @1Ipipen chunga kipal lhu diu ham @3akihet tapouve.
@@@1Kachapa, kaseiho hi phatechan @3ngaiphan, @2Kathusei jouse hi ngaiyin lang @3nakol sung jingin.
@@@1Kaseiho hi namitmun kitolmang @3sah hih-in, @2Abonchan nalungthim sunga ching @3jing jengin.
@@@1Ajeh chu akimu dohpa dia kaseiho @3hi hinna ahin, @2Atahsa phe le vou jong adamsah @3thei hel ahi.
@@@1Nalungthimin khothe ngaigeh-in umin, @2Hichea kona hi hinna gui hung @3kijandohji ahi.
@@@1Thu alamjang lou nasei chu @3ngan lang, @2thu chavai houlimna naman @3jong chu nga jengin.
@@@1Na mit tenin mitchangin mi ven lang, @2Namaiya thil navetdol jong @3jangkei ding ahi.
@@@1Nakengto te nia nachotna ding @3lampi kivet phat’in, @1Chutileh nalamlhah jouse kichen @3thei ding ahi.
@@@1Jet lama jong veilama jong kiheile @3le hih-in, @2Thilsea konin nakengphang sep doh @3jengin chemangin.
@@@1Kachapa, keima chihna hi lung @3lut’in ngaiphan, @2Thil kahet khen theidol jong hi @3nakol sungin ngaiyin;
@@@1Chutileh thil datkhenje nathep’a, @2Nakamsunga hetna cheng jing @3ding ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh numei chonthang @3hoi chu @2Akamsung khoiju lhumin alhum jin, @1Athusei him him jong chu @2Thao kinu sangin jong analjo jie.
@@@1Ahinla achaina chu gamsai thingkhat @3bangin akhan, @2Hemto chemjam hemin ahem jie.
@@@1Akengphang te nin thina a apuilut @3jin, @2Noimigam langa akal asonlut @3paijin ahi.
@@@1Hiche numeinu hin hinna lampia @3che ding khoh asapon, @2Alampi jouse jong akaleh leh-in @3akilhungin, @1Ahivangin amanun @2Hiche ahilam chu akihet tapoi.
@@@1Hijeh chun tun chate kasei @3ngaiyuvin, @2Kakamsung soh thu kiseihoa kon @3hin potdoh hih-un.
@@@1Hiche numeinu chu gamla tah-in @3peldoh jengin, @2Akotpi phung nailama jong kithah @3hih hel’in;
@@@1Achutilouleh min najabolna hung @3beiyin tin, @2Nahinkho lhum keiya min nuhepithei @3lou ding ahi.
@@@1Nathahat’a nahaona aboncha gamdang @3min @2A-angjanga akipom’uva, @1Natohga jong aboncha @2Gamchom mite insunga kitol lut @3ding ahi.
@@@1Nahinkho akichai lam tengleh genthei @3hesoh nathoh a @2Natahsa naphe navou apumpia min @3abahgam diu ahi.
@@@1Chutengleh nangin jong naseiya, @2“Kigahna kiti hi iti kadeimo hita a, @3Kalungthima jong Mi phoding hi iti @4kahot hitam!
@@@1Kenvang eihil ho thusei jong ka @3ngaipon, @2Mi hilchah a pang ho thusei jong @3ka nan ka-ngaipoi.
@@@1Houbung kikhopna a chun @2Keima amangthah pai ding kahitai,” @3nati ding ahi.
@@@1Naluikhuh a hung putdoh twi, @2Na twikula hung longdoh twi chu @3kidon tan,
@@@1Nangma twinah dunga twiput chu @3gamtina kithesoh ding hiya, @2Kholai dung jousea jong twi long @3ding hinam?
@@@1Hicheho hi nang dingbou hisah-in @3lang, @2Nahenga hung kholjin maljin ho @3chansah dan.
@@@1Nangma twinah phung chu phatthei @3chang hen, @2Nang jong nasenji najinu chunga @3kipah jingin;

@@@1Najinu sajuh lhagol hoitah le @3sajuh chal hoitah banga, @2Phat jousen aman nahepina chu @3nachunga dimjing hen; @1Amanu anglumin nakipa thanomsah @3jing ahin, @1Soh banga nahen chah jing hi aman @3nalungsetna chu ahi.
@@@1Kachapa, ipi dinga numei @3chavai chu @2Nangin nakideipi ding hiya, @1Numei kamhat hen hun chu @2Ibol’a a-angsung nakoichah ding @3ham?
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin mihem lamlhah @3jouse ave lhi jingin, @2Ache na lam lam amelchih jing @3jenge.
@@@1Migilou chu athepmona chengsen @3akipalsah jin, @1Chonset natoh atohdoh hon amatji @3ahiye.
@@@1Hitobang mi chu kigahna beiyin @3athijin, @2A ngol behseh jeh-in amangthah @3jin ahi.
@@@1Kachapa, na-inheng nagalveng dia @3thilman a kitung nahiya, @1Hetphah lou mi dinga thilman dia @3kipedoh nahiya,
@@@1Nakamsung soh thuseiya kipal @3nahitah a, @2Nakamsunga naseisa nathu seihon @3nahel-oh ahileh

@@@1Hiche hi bol lechun @2Nang le nang beh nakihuhdoh ding @3ahi kachapa; @1Ijeh-inem itileh na-inheng @3nagalvengin @2Nachunga tha anei ahitan. @1Kinloi tah-in chen lang @2Na-inhengpa henga gatao loiyin.
@@@1Ihjong ihmut dan lang @2Namit teni jong kisinsah dan; @1Namit mul mitgeiya keh ho jong @2Kicholdo sah hih hel’in;
@@@1Sadelpa masanga sakhigol kihinso @3bangin @2Nang le nang kihuhdoh loiyin. @1Vacha delpa khut’a toldoh vacha @3bangin @2Nangle nang kihuhdoh loiyin.
@@@1Vo mi thase, chen lang sihmi khu @3gaven. @2Alamjot aumchan geltoh-in chih @3theinan neiyin.
@@@1Haosa bei vaibol bei @2Vaihom beihel’in jong
@@@1Sihmin nipi laiya aneh ding @3akikhol’in, @2Akivahna ding khal lhun teng @3apokhom theiye.
@@@1Vo mi thase, hikoma hi itih chan @3nalup lup ding ham? @2Nalupna a kona itih teng nahung @3thodoh ding ham?
@@@1Nakimoh jam jama, namoh lup @3lup’a, @2Nakhut chasah nom louva nanop @3uma ahileh
